output.summary: Refactor vertical padding architecture: remove section padding, consolidate all vertical padding onto the container element, and remove negative y-insets from the :before pseudo-element. Achieves identical 72px mobile / 92px desktop inner charcoal padding with a cleaner DOM structure.

fileChanges.description: Update section and container classes to move all vertical padding to container and remove pseudo negative y-insets
fileChanges.details:
1. Section element: Remove 'py-10 sm:py-16' from the className string, changing 'testimonials-carousel dark bg-transparent! py-10 sm:py-16' to 'testimonials-carousel dark bg-transparent!'
2. Container div: Change 'py-10 md:py-15' to 'py-18 md:py-23' (72px mobile / 92px desktop)
3. Container div pseudo: Change 'before:-inset-y-8' to 'before:inset-y-0' to match container bounds exactly

Full container className changes from:
'container relative py-10 md:py-15 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:-inset-y-8 md:before:-inset-x-8'
to:
'container relative py-18 md:py-23 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:inset-y-0 md:before:-inset-x-8'

fileChanges.description: Mirror the same class changes in the PHP frontend template
fileChanges.details:
1. Section element (line 45): Remove 'py-10 sm:py-16' from theme_block_props first argument, changing 'testimonials-carousel dark bg-transparent! py-10 sm:py-16' to 'testimonials-carousel dark bg-transparent!'
2. Container div (line 46): Change 'py-10 md:py-15' to 'py-18 md:py-23' and change 'before:-inset-y-8' to 'before:inset-y-0'

Full container class changes from:
'container relative py-10 md:py-15 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:-inset-y-8 md:before:-inset-x-8'
to:
'container relative py-18 md:py-23 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:inset-y-0 md:before:-inset-x-8'

verification.externalSpacingNote: External gap between section edge and charcoal background is eliminated (was 8px mobile / 32px desktop). This is expected per the user's request to remove section padding. Block spacing is typically handled by WordPress block gap.

designDecisions.decision: Use py-18 (72px) for mobile container padding to match current total inner charcoal padding
designDecisions.evidence: Current mobile: container py-10 (40px) + pseudo extension 32px = 72px. Tailwind py-18 = 18 * 4px = 72px.

designDecisions.decision: Use md:py-23 (92px) for desktop container padding to match current total inner charcoal padding
designDecisions.evidence: Current desktop: container py-15 (60px) + pseudo extension 32px = 92px. Tailwind py-23 = 23 * 4px = 92px.

designDecisions.decision: Use before:inset-y-0 instead of removing inset-y entirely, to ensure the pseudo-element has explicit vertical bounds
designDecisions.evidence: The :before uses position:absolute, so explicit inset-y-0 ensures it fills the container bounds exactly. Without any inset-y declaration the element would not have defined top/bottom positioning.

designDecisions.decision: Breakpoint for container padding changes at md (768px), matching current container breakpoint
designDecisions.evidence: Current container uses md:py-15 breakpoint. New structure preserves the same md breakpoint: md:py-23.

output.qaNote: Visual comparison needed at mobile (375px) and desktop (1440px) to verify inner charcoal padding matches the original 72px/92px. External spacing change (loss of 8px mobile / 32px desktop gap above/below charcoal) is intentional per user request.
